summary_en: 1,650,000 shares (3.26% of shares outstanding), ¥1.8 billion upper limit, open-market purchase on Tokyo Stock Exchange, May 25–August 31, 2026.
title_en: Notice Regarding Determination of Treasury Stock Acquisition Matters
translation_en_brief: Vision Inc. (TSE Prime, code 9416) filed notice on May 22, 2026 of a board resolution to acquire treasury shares pursuant to Article 165(3) of the Companies Act and the Company's Articles of Incorporation. The acquisition will target up to 1,650,000 ordinary shares, representing 3.26% of issued shares outstanding (excluding treasury stock). The total acquisition cost is capped at ¥1.8 billion. Purchases will occur on the Tokyo Stock Exchange via open-market trading from May 25 through August 31, 2026. The stated rationale is to enhance shareholder returns and improve capital efficiency under the medium-term business plan, while enabling flexible capital allocation in response to changing business conditions.
